```erlang
-module(solution).
-export([solve/2]).

solve(Grid, K) ->
    M = length(Grid),
    N = length(hd(Grid)),
    TeleportMap = build_teleport_map(Grid, M, N),
    Dist = init_dist(M, N, K),
    Dist0 = set_dist(Dist, 0, 0, 0, 0),
    PQ = [{0, 0, 0, 0}],
    process(PQ, TeleportMap, Dist0, M, N, K).

build_teleport_map(Grid, M, N) ->
    lists:map(
        fun(I) ->
            lists:map(
                fun(J) ->
                    [ {X, Y} || X <- lists:seq(0, M-1), Y <- lists:seq(0, N-1), grid_value(Grid, X, Y) =< grid_value(Grid, I, J) ]
                end, lists:seq(0, N-1)
            )
        end, lists:seq(0, M-1)
    ).

grid_value(Grid, X, Y) ->
    Row = lists:nth(X+1, Grid),
    lists:nth(Y+1, Row).

init_dist(M, N, K) ->
    lists:map(
        fun(I) ->
            lists:map(
                fun(J) ->
                    lists:map(
                        fun(T) -> infinity end, lists:seq(0, K)
                    )
                end, lists:seq(0, N-1)
            )
        end, lists:seq(0, M-1)
    ).

set_dist(Dist, I, J, T, Value) ->
    lists:map(
        fun(I1) ->
            lists:map(
                fun(J1) ->
                    lists:map(
                        fun(T1) ->
                            if I1 == I, J1 == J, T1 == T -> Value;
                               true -> lists:nth(T1, lists:nth(J1, lists:nth(I1, Dist)))
                            end
                        end, lists:seq(0, K)
                    )
                end, lists:seq(0, N-1)
            )
        end, lists:seq(0, M-1)
    ).

process(PQ, TeleportMap, Dist, M, N, K) ->
    case min_element(PQ) of
        nil ->
            -1;
        {Cost, I, J, T} ->
            if
                I == M-1, J == N-1 ->
                    Cost;
                true ->
                    CurrentDist = get_dist(Dist, I, J, T),
                    if
                        Cost > CurrentDist ->
                            process(PQ, TeleportMap, Dist, M, N, K);
                        true ->
                            NewPQ = process_moves(PQ, TeleportMap, Dist, M, N, K, I, J, T, Cost),
                            process(NewPQ, TeleportMap, Dist, M, N, K)
                    end
            end
    end.

min_element([]) ->
    nil;
min_element(Heap) ->
    lists:min(Heap).

process_moves(PQ, TeleportMap, Dist, M, N, K, I, J, T, Cost) ->
    NewPQ = process_regular_moves(PQ, I, J, T, Cost, M, N, Dist),
    NewPQ1 = process_teleport_moves(PQ, TeleportMap, I, J, T, Cost, K, Dist, M, N),
    NewPQ1.

process_regular_moves(PQ, I, J, T, Cost, M, N, Dist) ->
    RightMove = case J+1 < N of
        true ->
            NewCost = Cost + grid_value(Grid, I, J+1),
            if
                NewCost < get_dist(Dist, I, J+1, T) ->
                    add_to_pq(PQ, {NewCost, I, J+1, T});
                true ->
                    PQ
            end;
        false ->
            PQ
    end,
    DownMove = case I+1 < M of
        true ->
            NewCost = Cost + grid_value(Grid, I+1, J),
            if
                NewCost < get_dist(Dist, I+1, J, T) ->
                    add_to_pq(PQ, {NewCost, I+1, J, T});
                true ->
                    PQ
            end;
        false ->
            PQ
    end,
    RightMove = RightMove, DownMove = DownMove, RightMove.

process_teleport_moves(PQ, TeleportMap, I, J, T, Cost, K, Dist, M, N) ->
    if
        T < K ->
            TeleportList = lists:nth(I+1, TeleportMap),
            TeleportList1 = lists:nth(J+1, TeleportList),
            lists:foreach(
                fun({X, Y}) ->
                    NewT = T + 1,
                    if
                        Cost < get_dist(Dist, X, Y, NewT) ->
                            add_to_pq(PQ, {Cost, X, Y, NewT});
                        true ->
                            ok
                    end
                end, TeleportList1)
        true ->
            PQ
    end.

add_to_pq(PQ, Element) ->
    [Element | PQ].

get_dist(Dist, I, J, T) ->
    lists:nth(I+1, Dist),
    lists:nth(J+1, lists:nth(I+1, Dist)),
    lists:nth(T+1, lists:nth(J+1, lists:nth(I+1, Dist))).
